customManagers.description: Recognise hoisted version comments above pinned GitHub Action SHAs (format: `# <owner>/<repo> vX.Y.Z` followed by a `uses: ... @<40-char-sha>` line). yaml-validator-mcp's manual cleanup hoists the inline `# vX.Y.Z` comment to the line above; this manager keeps Renovate able to bump both SHA and version comment together.
